items.title: Align Maestro Pricing with Seedance in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update lowers the Maestro standard pricing to a Seedance-like formula of `0.85 credits/second`, while retaining existing multipliers for different scenarios. Key API documentation and service introduction materials have been updated to reflect these changes, resulting in significant cost reductions for users. Validation tests confirm the accuracy of the new pricing structure.

items.title: Enhance Maestro Task Cards with Request Params and Trace ID in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update enriches the Maestro task detail cards in Nexior by displaying additional request parameters such as mode, scenario, style, quality, aspect ratio, duration, and languages. The trace ID is now visible on both success and failure cards, improving task tracking and debugging. These enhancements ensure that users have more context and information at their fingertips.

items.title: Enhance OAuth Login Flow in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a same-origin postMessage mechanism for OAuth popup logins, allowing the iframe to receive login success notifications directly. Key files modified include `Login.vue`, `Google.vue`, and `Github.vue`, ensuring a seamless integration with existing deep link and connector callback functionalities. This enhancement improves user experience by maintaining session consistency across different login methods.

items.title: Enhance China Invoice Requirements in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update mandates the inclusion of comprehensive billing details for China invoice profiles, including invoice type, taxpayer ID, and bank information. The changes ensure that both general and special VAT invoices are clearly communicated in the UI. Additionally, input validation has been improved to handle whitespace-only entries effectively.

items.title: Enhance Mobile Responsiveness in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update improves mobile layout by making the top header responsive, allowing navigation items to scroll horizontally. Additionally, it constrains the models catalog controls and footer to prevent horizontal overflow on narrow viewports. Code blocks are now scoped to scroll internally, enhancing user experience on mobile devices.

items.title: Update Distribution Analytics Icons in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update replaces unregistered distribution analytics summary icons with the registered icons already in use by the distributions console. This change prevents reward, order amount, and invitee cards from displaying empty icon circles, enhancing the user interface. The modifications were validated with a clean build.

items.title: Refine auth modal width for better UX in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update adjusts the global authentication iframe modal's maximum width from 430px to 400px, enhancing the user experience. The mobile viewport constraint remains intact, ensuring a responsive design. This change is purely cosmetic and does not affect any existing functionality.

items.title: Fix(scripts): restore install/start/stop.ps1 + start kills stale instances first in Wisdom 🐛
Update query-string to version 9.4.1 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the query-string package from version 9.4.0 to 9.4.1. The new version includes a fix for handling relative URLs with fragments, enhancing the overall functionality of the application.

items.title: Enhance Logging for Task Results in Wisdom 📊
items.summary: This update introduces detailed logging for various async UI task runners, allowing operators to track the outcomes of actions like group management, moments posting, and search queries. Key changes include logging results from `wechat_service` calls and UI task executions. This enhancement improves transparency without altering existing functionalities.

items.title: Enhanced Debug Logging for WeChat Operations in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces extensive debug and trace logging across the WeChat read, send, and database paths. Key changes include detailed logging in `wechat_read.py`, `wechat_send.py`, and `wechat_db.py`, allowing for better observability without altering existing behaviors. The logging levels are structured to ensure normal operations remain quiet while providing insights when needed.

items.title: Refine Smoke Scripts for Consistency in Wisdom 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the smoke test scripts in the Wisdom project by introducing shared helper functions and improving consistency across various test files. Key changes include the addition of new argument handling methods and the requirement for media sources in specific tests. Overall, the modifications streamline the testing process and ensure better maintainability.
